overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing exploration of house common rooms. The player walks through the warm organic Hufflepuff common room, transitions through a dark gothic dungeon corridor with other students, and enters the green-lit Slytherin common room with its underwater aesthetic and marble architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular wooden common room with fireplace and hanging plants

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the common room, panning left to observe the wooden architecture, balcony, and fireplace

notable_agents.action: student in robes standing near the back wall observing the room

entered.detail: domed wooden ceiling with exposed beams and hanging plants
large stone hearth with active fire providing warm lighting
lush green vines and plants suspended from the ceiling
curved wooden upper level with decorative railings
plush seating arranged around the central floor area

segments.scene_description: The player explores a warm, circular common room built from natural wood with a high domed ceiling. Lush hanging plants drape from above, and a stone fireplace burns brightly on the right. The space feels cozy and organic, with a wooden balcony visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dungeon corridor leading to Slytherin entrance

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions from Hufflepuff common room to dark dungeon corridor
approaching the distinctive snake-shaped stone archway marking the Slytherin entrance
stopping briefly as the carved wooden door opens to reveal the Slytherin common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone corridor toward the Slytherin entrance, passing other students

notable_agents.action: group of students in dark robes walking through the corridor toward the camera

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic architecture
thick stone pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling
torch-like wall lights providing dim illumination
ornate stone arch carved to resemble coiling snakes
heavy dark wood door with intricate serpent carvings

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a dark, gothic dungeon corridor with stone vaulted ceilings and dim wall sconces. The player walks forward, passing students in robes, and approaches an ornate snake-shaped archway leading to a heavy carved wooden door that opens to reveal the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin common room with underwater theme and green ambient lighting

events.description: entering the Slytherin common room through the heavy wooden door into the green-lit chamber
beginning to ascend the spiral staircase on the left side of the room

agents.ego_description: exploring the Slytherin common room, walking past the central fountain and tapestries, then ascending the spiral staircase

entered.detail: large stone sculpture of mermaids in a circular fountain basin
wall-mounted lantern emitting an eerie green magical light
tall green-veined marble pillars supporting the ceiling
large wall hangings depicting ships and sea creatures
winding stone staircase with moss-covered walls
upper level walkway with stone railings overlooking the common room
wooden board with papers and notices pinned to it

segments.scene_description: The player enters the Slytherin common room, a stone chamber with green ambient lighting and an underwater aesthetic. A large mermaid fountain dominates the center, while nautical tapestries hang between marble columns. The player walks through the room and begins ascending a spiral staircase on the left, passing moss-covered walls and stone archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cozy, organic living space through a dark gothic corridor and into a cold, underwater-themed chamber. It begins in a warm, circular common room characterized by natural wood, a high domed ceiling with hanging plants, and a brightly burning stone fireplace. As the camera moves forward, the organic warmth gives way to a dim dungeon corridor with stone vaulted ceilings and flickering wall sconces, passing students in robes before approaching an ornate snake-shaped archway. The scene then opens into the Slytherin common room, where the lighting shifts to a moody green ambient glow reflecting off marble columns and a central mermaid fountain. Finally, the camera glides past nautical tapestries and moss-covered walls before ascending a stone spiral staircase.
